headline: Evergrande Liquidators Seek $8.4 Billion From PwC in HK Court

article.title: Evergrande Liquidators Seek $8.4 Billion From PwC in HK Court
article.summary: China Evergrande’s liquidators are seeking 57 billion yuan ($8.4 billion) in their lawsuit against PricewaterhouseCoopers International Ltd. and its mainland China and Hong Kong affiliates, among the largest corporate claims ever sought in the city.
